Container.Name: Blackcoin-Quantum-Quasar
Container.Overview: The world's first Proof of Stake coin, now upgraded with Quantum Resistance. This container provides a full headless node accessible instantly via a web browser VNC interface. Help secure the network and stake your coins!

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port to access the visual Wallet UI in your browser

Config.Name: P2P Port
Config.Description: The P2P network port for connecting to other nodes

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Location to safely store the blockchain data and your wallet.dat file
